description: Normative tool registry for reader and analyst bundles. Tools are backend data and action surfaces; Block[] is the separate response artifact contract.
design_rules: System selects tool bundle; model selects tools within the bundle.
Reader-only tools may access raw untrusted content; analyst-facing tools may not.
Tool inputs and outputs must validate against JSON Schema.
All outputs must be traceable to source refs or deterministic computations.
Side-effecting tools return pending actions unless policy explicitly auto-approves them.
Non-read-only tools remain write-intent policy boundaries even when approval_required is false.

bundles.description: Research based on claims, events, and evidence bundles

tools.name: resolve_subjects
tools.description: Resolve free-form text into canonical subject refs.

tools.name: resolve_period
tools.description: Resolve free-form time expressions into canonical period objects.

tools.name: get_quote
tools.description: Return latest quote-related facts for a tradable subject.

tools.name: get_series
tools.description: Return normalized time series for one or more subjects.

tools.name: get_performance_series
tools.description: Return aligned performance series with a consistent basis and normalization.

tools.name: get_company_profile
tools.description: Return issuer profile and key descriptors.

tools.name: get_statement_facts
tools.description: Return normalized statement facts for requested periods.

tools.name: get_key_stats
tools.description: Return key stats and ratios with as-of times and source refs.

tools.name: get_segment_facts
tools.description: Return segment-level facts, definitions, and warnings.

tools.name: get_analyst_consensus
tools.description: Return analyst rating distribution, targets, and coverage warnings.

tools.name: get_eps_surprise
tools.description: Return estimate versus actual EPS facts by quarter.

tools.name: get_holders
tools.description: Return institutional or insider holder information.

tools.name: get_claims
tools.description: Return claims for a set of subjects with predicate and time filters.

tools.name: get_claim_clusters
tools.description: Return clustered claims for deduped research and Home feed construction.

tools.name: get_events
tools.description: Return structured events for one or more subjects.

tools.name: get_entity_impacts
tools.description: Return impact edges for routing and prioritization.

tools.name: get_evidence_bundle
tools.description: Return verified evidence locators and supporting documents for claims or events.

tools.name: get_fact_lineage
tools.description: Return provenance and supersession history for a fact.

tools.name: get_coverage_report
tools.description: Return freshness, entitlement, coverage, and warning metadata for a subject.

tools.name: get_peer_set
tools.description: Return a ranked peer set for comparison.

tools.name: screen
tools.description: Execute a screen and return matches and matched facts.

tools.name: search_raw_documents
tools.description: Reader-only raw document search surface for untrusted text retrieval before extraction.

tools.name: fetch_raw_document
tools.description: Reader-only raw document fetch surface for parsing or extraction.

tools.name: extract_mentions
tools.description: Extract subject mentions from a raw document and persist canonical mention rows.

tools.name: extract_claims
tools.description: Extract claims from a raw document.

tools.name: extract_candidate_facts
tools.description: Extract candidate facts from a raw document.

tools.name: extract_events
tools.description: Extract event candidates from a raw document.

tools.name: classify_sentiment
tools.description: Classify sentiment and stance from a raw social document.

tools.name: create_alert
tools.description: Approval-sensitive write-intent tool that returns a pending action until orchestration or the user confirms it.

tools.name: add_to_watchlist
tools.description: Write-intent tool that may be auto-approved by policy but remains a policy boundary.

tools.name: create_agent
tools.description: Approval-sensitive write-intent tool that returns a pending action until explicit approval.
